fields.label: Reservation Number
fields.description: Auto-generated unique reservation reference (RES-YYYY-#####). This is the single identifier used across all reservation workflows.

fields.label: Source Channel
fields.description: The Market Place / channel through which this reservation was made.

fields.label: Reservation Type
fields.options:
Individual
Corporate
Group
House Use
Complimentary
OTA
fields.description: Individual: private guest. Corporate: corporate account booking. Group: multi-room group block. House Use: internal staff/operational use (no revenue). Complimentary: complimentary stay (theoretical revenue only). OTA: booking via Online Travel Agency channel.

fields.label: Reservation Status
fields.options:
Draft
Hold
Confirmed
Checked In
Checked Out
Cancelled
No Show
Expired
fields.description:
Lifecycle state of the reservation.

Allowed transitions:
  Draft → Hold
  Hold → Confirmed | Cancelled | Expired
  Confirmed → Checked In | Cancelled
  Checked In → Checked Out | Cancelled (admin only)
  Any active state → No Show (policy-driven)

Payment status is tracked separately; do not use reservation_status to represent payment state.

fields.label: Payment Status
fields.options:
Pending
Partly Paid
Paid
Failed
Refunded
fields.description: Current payment collection state. This is orthogonal to reservation_status: a reservation can be Confirmed but payment still Pending (e.g. pay-at-check-in policy), or Checked Out with a Refunded payment.

fields.label: Guest Profile Kind
fields.description: Determines which guest fields are active. Primary Guest: fill primary_guest_name/email/phone. Corporate Account: fill corporate_guest link instead.

fields.label: Primary Guest Name
fields.description: Full name of the primary (lead) guest. Required for individual reservations.

fields.label: Primary Guest Email
fields.description: Email address used for booking confirmations, invoices, and communication.

fields.label: Primary Guest Phone
fields.description: Contact phone number for the primary guest.

fields.label: Corporate Guest
fields.description: Link to the Hotel Guest record with guest_type = Corporate. Required when reservation_type = Corporate.

fields.label: Customer (ERPNext)
fields.description: ERPNext Customer document linked to this reservation. Auto-populated from corporate_guest.customer on corporate bookings, or auto-created for individual guests on confirmation.

fields.label: Group Details
fields.description: Group-specific fields. Only visible when reservation_type = Group.

fields.label: Group Name
fields.description: Official name of the group (e.g. event name, company name, wedding party). Used in rooming list headers and billing documents.

fields.label: Group Billing Mode
fields.description: Central: all charges billed to the master group customer. Split: each room is billed individually to the occupant; only specified charges go to the master customer.

fields.label: Master Payer (Customer)
fields.description: The ERPNext Customer that receives the consolidated group invoice. Required when group_billing_mode = Central.

fields.label: OTA Details
fields.description: Online Travel Agency booking details. Only visible when reservation_type = OTA.

fields.label: OTA Channel
fields.description: The OTA platform through which this booking was received (e.g. Booking.com, Expedia).

fields.label: Collection Model
fields.description: Hotel Collect: guest pays hotel directly on check-in/out; hotel remits commission. OTA Collect/Prepaid: OTA collects payment from guest; hotel invoices OTA net of commission.

fields.label: OTA Commission Amount
fields.description: Commission amount payable to the OTA, in hotel currency. Used for net revenue reporting.

fields.label: OTA Virtual Card Reference
fields.description: Virtual credit card reference provided by the OTA for prepaid bookings. Used to match payments against OTA invoices.

fields.label: Internal / Complimentary Details
fields.description: Fields for internal House Use and Complimentary reservation types.

fields.label: Cost Centre
fields.description: Department or cost centre absorbing the room cost for internal allocations.

fields.label: Reason / Authorisation
fields.description: Mandatory justification for House Use or Complimentary. Captures who authorised the comp/house use and the business reason.

fields.label: Theoretical Room Revenue
fields.description: What the rooms would have earned at the standard rack rate. Populated for reporting and RevPAR calculations. No actual revenue is recognised.

fields.label: Check-In Date
fields.description: Planned check-in date. Room availability conflicts are evaluated from this date at the hotel's standard 12:00 boundary.

fields.label: Check-Out Date
fields.description: Planned check-out date. Must be strictly after from_date. Room availability conflicts are evaluated up to (but not including) this date.

fields.label: Number of Nights
fields.description: Automatically computed as to_date minus from_date. Used for pricing calculations.

fields.label: Hold Expires At
fields.description: Datetime when this reservation's room hold will automatically expire if payment is not received. Populated when status = Hold. A background job monitors this and transitions status to Expired and room back to available.

fields.label: Actual Check-In Time
fields.description: Timestamp when the guest physically checked in (set when status transitions to Checked In). Distinct from from_date, which is the planned date.

fields.label: Actual Check-Out Time
fields.description: Timestamp when the guest physically checked out (set when status transitions to Checked Out).

fields.label: Rooms
fields.description: One row per allocated room. Each row captures the specific room, pricing, and the occupant assigned to that room. Room availability is validated per row using the centralized room availability utility.

fields.label: Room Blocks
fields.description: Inventory blocks by room type for group reservations. Each row reserves a quantity of rooms of a given type. Individual rooms are picked up into the Rooms table as guests are assigned.

fields.label: Room Blocks
fields.description: Room type inventory blocks for this group reservation. Protected rooms cannot be booked by individual or non-group reservations for the same period.

fields.label: Subtotal
fields.description: Sum of all room_total values from the rooms child table before any reservation-level discount.

fields.label: Discount Type
fields.description: Type of reservation-level discount to apply. Leave blank for no discount. Percentage: applies % to subtotal. Fixed Amount: subtracts fixed value from subtotal.

fields.label: Discount Value
fields.description: Discount value: percentage (0-100) if discount_type = Percentage, or currency amount if discount_type = Fixed Amount.

fields.label: Discount Amount
fields.description: Computed currency amount deducted from subtotal based on discount_type and discount value.

fields.label: Total Amount
fields.description: Subtotal minus discount_amount. This is the guest-facing amount due for accommodation.

fields.label: Net Total (After Tax)
fields.description: Total amount after applicable taxes are applied. Populated when a Sales Invoice is created.

fields.label: Sales Invoice
fields.description: ERPNext Sales Invoice document generated for this reservation. Created automatically on confirmation or on manual trigger. Used for accounting and payment reconciliation.

fields.label: Payment Entry
fields.description: ERPNext Payment Entry linked to this reservation for direct payments. For split or partial payments, individual entries are tracked at the invoice level.

fields.label: Reservation Invoice Ledger
fields.description: All Sales Invoices generated for this reservation, including base invoice, extensions, and credit notes.

fields.label: Reservation Invoices
fields.description: Ledger of all invoices linked to this reservation for traceability across stay adjustments.

fields.label: Reservation Payment Ledger
fields.description: All Payment Entries collected for this reservation.

fields.label: Reservation Payments
fields.description: Ledger of all payment entries linked to this reservation for full payment history.

fields.label: Payment Transaction ID
fields.description: External payment gateway transaction reference (e.g. Paystack transaction reference). Populated by the online payment callback.

fields.label: Legacy / Migration References
fields.description: These fields hold backward-compatibility links to the pre-consolidation doctypes. They are populated during data migration and should not be edited manually. They will be retired after full migration is verified.

fields.label: Amended From
fields.description: Set automatically when this document is created as an amendment of a cancelled canonical reservation.
